case_title: LINDA M MILANI ET AL VS. SALESIAN BOYS' & GIRLS CLUB, INC. A CALIFORNIA

docket_entries.description: QUIET TITLE - REAL PROPERTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MILANI, LINDA M MILANI, JOANNE NORTON, MARILYN E BURKE, CAROLE ANNE AS TO DEFENDANT SALESIAN BOYS' & GIRLS CLUB, INC. A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR AUG-19-2015 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAY-18-2015 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JUL-27-2015
OVERPAYMENT, TRAN # W1015318O006, TAG # 033246 FILED BY PLAINTIFF MILANI, LINDA M MILANI, JOANNE NORTON, MARILYN E BURKE, CAROLE ANNE

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR SEP-29-2015 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE AUG-19-2015 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 57800156)
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF SEP-29-2015 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
